agent-kit.details: ChatKit file and image upload storage
agent-kit.pricing: $0.10 / GB-day after 1 GB free per account per month

containers.pricing: 1 GB $0.03, 4 GB $0.12, 16 GB $0.48, 64 GB $1.92 per 20-minute session per container.

web-search.pricing: $25.00 / 1k calls + Search content tokens are free.
